channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Household clear out dumped, 16th May
item.description:
Popular spot for household fly tippers. Junction of Bannockburn and Brookedene.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bannockburn Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Open bags of household waste, 16th May
item.description:
Dumped on pavement and behind railings. Blocking pavement access for all users and attracting vermin.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hylton Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on pavement spilling into car parking spaces, 16th May
item.description:
Many large cardboard boxes and other littler around 12ft of rubbish on the pavement next to carparking space and pavement. On canal wharf.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Canal Walk, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More Rubbish dumped here, 16th May
item.description:
This spot is attracting more fly tippers and vermin. I see more bags dumped daily. Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hylton Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped metal bed base, 16th May
item.description:
Dumped overnight. Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brookdene Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Suitcase dumped at bus stop, 16th May
item.description:
Suitcase left at bus stop

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmers End Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Commercial Fly Tipping - Outside Collection Window, 16th May
item.description:
Another instance for another consecutive week of The Three Hounds Bar & Brewery leaving their rubbish on the public highway, outside of their collection window and against their planning permission where rubbish should be collected from the rear of the premises. Please stop this and issue fines and the enforcement notice has clearly not been a deterrent having been issued in December 2025 and still occurring on a regular basis.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 63, Beckenham Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Kerb broken, 16th May
item.description:
The kern opposite 97 Lollard Street is broken.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 91-100, Lollard Street, Lambeth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Non council bin on pavement, 16th May
item.description:
Non council bin in the street. It is full of waste and the waste is not collected as not part of the council. This bin should not be used

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 18-24, Chatham Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Part fallen off a car is in the road, 16th May
item.description:
A part whi h seems to have fallen off a car is in the road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bourne Vale, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown public path!, 16th May
item.description:
Please can Bromley council help with this area? First Port management company are not maintaining this area along the river Poole, the are is so overgrown and it's dark to walk along it's a public safety risk. Please can you put some sort of pressure on the landowners to maintain it or should be taken back into Bromley council management.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Montana Gardens, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sofa dumped on pavement on Thorntree Road, 16th May
item.description:
Left between Coxmount and Wolfe

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wolfe Crescent, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridge in the street, 16th May
item.description:
The fridge have been dispose in the street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 18-24, Chatham Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridge left on Searles Road, 16th May
item.description:
This was left here around 2 days ago, right outside 26 searles road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25, Paragon Mews, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress , bags and boxes, 16th May
item.description:
This is happening on an almost daily basis. It is outrageous that the council is not installing a video to catch and prevent this. We are paying thousands in council tax and hundred of thousands renovating our homes to lift the area up.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bushberry Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 16th May
item.description:
Household waste placed on street waiting for foxes to redistribute

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Westcombe Park Road, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Light not working and making excessive noise, 16th May
item.description:
This light tries to start at night time but couldnt start and hence makes a continuous big noise whole night. Noise is so loud its affecting our sleep.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Barth Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household waste at top of Invicta Road, 16th May
item.description:
This fly tipping warnings and perhaps fines should be issued

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Needs painting g, 16th May
item.description:
This sewer vent needs the existing paint removed and repainted. Looking extremely tatty.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Woodbastwick Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sunk paving causing trip hazard, 16th May
item.description:
Was fixed a year or 2 ago. Badly it seems

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Piermont Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
